title: FPS++
description: This modpack gives you a big fps boost.
body:
## INFO   
**This modpack is made to boost your fps, so you can use it to boost your fps. The only mod that doesn't contribute to more fps or is dependency is iris shaders. This pack is client side, but some of its mods will work on the server side as well. Use this if you want better performance in minecraft. It also contains a shader and a nice texture pack. You can use this as a base for your modpack. More mc versions will be added in the future.**

## PERFORMANCE   
**This modpack boosts the performance by a ton. In a big storage room, my fps without any mods was 200-300(with default settings and 16 chunks). With the modpack it increased by ~640%, going to around 1700-1950 fps. Because I have a decent  pc, I can use shaders, and with shaders my pc gets around 120-180 fps with 12 chunks and 80-110 with 16 chunks(with complementary unbound ultra preset).**  
**Without the modpack here I get 314 fps:**
![Without the modpack here I get 314 fps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/101ce7b037084d07cdaabb2b5719f1ac24385d04.png)
**With the modpack here I get 2277 fps(624% fps increase):**
![With the modpack here I get 2277 fps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/436f0bf23b1159eb7b4e3528706b78b831a3fa25.png)


## MODS
<details>
<summary>Optimization Mods</summary>
  
**Alternate Current - Optimizes redstone so it reduces performance less.       
BadOptimizations - Adds a few micro optimizations.    
Bedrodium - Hides the invisible sides of bedrock, increasing performance. 
Concurrent Chunk Management Engine - Boosts chunk performance.    
Cull Less Leaves - Hides inner(almost unnoticeable) layers of leaves, increasing performance     
Enhanced Block Entities - Increases block entity performance     
Entity Culling - Doesn't render entities that you can't see, increasing performance    
FastAnim - Speeds up entity animation calculations 
Faster Random - Speeds up getting random numbers, unnoticiable differences in world gen.(check note)
FerriteCore - Optimizes memory usage   
ImmediatelyFast - Speeds up immediate mode rendering
Lithium - No-compromises game logic/server optimizations   
More Culling - Culls a lot of things  
Noisium - Optimizes worldgen   
Reese's Sodium Options - Adds an alternative options menu for sodium
ServerCore - Optimizes the server   
Sodium - Replaces the rendering engine with a better one  
Sodium Extra - Adds more settings for sodium   
Starlight - Rewrites the light engine, making it better    
Methane - Replacement for Starlight for 1.20.6+**

</details>
<details>
<summary>Other Mods</summary>
  
**Cloth Config API   
Fabric API   
Iris Shaders   
Mod Menu    
YetAnotherConfigLib**

</details>
</details>
<details>
<summary>Shaders/Texture Packs</summary>

**Complementary Shaders - Unbound (Shader)   
Faithful 64x (Texture Pack)**

</details>

**Note: Feel free to remove this if you want don't want slightly different world gen.**

## SUPPORT
**if you have any problems with the modpack, dm me(legoaggelos) on discord.**
